title: [FATAL] [lib.rs:478] ["range end index 4 out of range for slice of length 3"]
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 bit(24));
INSERT IGNORE t1 (c1) VALUES (b'100011111100001110010100001000000101000011011100000011010001110');
SELECT c1 FROM t1 WHERE FALSE NOT LIKE CONVERT(c1, CHAR);
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
Execute without crash
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
Crash down the server
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
Release Version: v8.3.0
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 1a0c3ac3292fff7742faa0c00a662ccb66ba40db
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-08-20 10:13:01
GoVersion: go1.21.10
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(50), c3 BINARY(1), c4 DATE);
INSERT INTO t2 (c1, c2, c3, c4) VALUES (2, NULL, b'11110000', NULL);
SELECT c2 FROM t2 WHERE c1 = (SELECT MAX(c1) FROM t2) AND c3 NOT LIKE c2;
SELECT c3 FROM t2 WHERE c1 < 5 AND c4 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Range end index out of range for slice
